name: builder_functional_editors
outcome_goal: Make every builder step editor functional: check rules, human channels, API integrations, agent context/output

jobs.label: p1_shared_fields_and_types
p2_check_editor
jobs.prompt:
## Objective Create the CheckEditor component for the builder. ## Working Directory `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/builder/` ## Context Read these files first: - `stepTypes.ts` — look at ValidationRule interface, createValidationRule() function, PipelineStep fields (validationRules, agenticReview, reviewPrompt, doneCriteria) - `CriteriaBuilder.tsx` — understand how the existing done criteria component works - `editors/SharedFields.tsx` — understand the shared fields pattern (created in previous step) - `BuilderPage.tsx` — find the check step editor section (search for `stepType === 'check'`) to understand what to replace ## Create: builder/editors/CheckEditor.tsx Props: `{ step: PipelineStep; onUpdate: (patch: Partial) => void }` ### Section 1: Validation Rules Render `step.validationRules ?? []` as a list. Each rule: ```tsx
{rule.type}
{/* Type selector */} {/* Conditional fields based on rule.type */} {rule.type === 'regex' && (
)} {rule.type === 'threshold' && (
)} {rule.type === 'type_check' && (
)} {rule.type === 'count' && (
)} {rule.type === 'required_fields' && ( )}
``` When updating a rule, clone the validationRules array, update the specific rule, call onUpdate. "+ Add Rule" button at bottom, calls `createValidationRule('threshold')` from stepTypes.ts and appends. ### Section 2: Agentic Review Toggle checkbox for `agenticReview`. When checked, show: - `reviewPrompt` textarea with placeholder "What should the review agent evaluate beyond the hard rules?" - Read-only route display: `auto/review` ### Section 3: Done Criteria Import and render `CriteriaBuilder` component, wired to `step.doneCriteria`. Wrap in a `
` with label "Done Criteria". ## IMPORTANT - Use builder-section, builder-section__label, builder-input, builder-select, builder-textarea CSS classes - All inputs use className="builder-input", all selects use className="builder-select" - Handle empty validationRules gracefully (show "No rules defined" + add button) - Export the component as named export

jobs.label: p2_human_editor
jobs.prompt:
## Objective Create the HumanEditor component for the builder. ## Working Directory `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/builder/` ## Context Read these files first: - `stepTypes.ts` — look at PipelineStep fields (authority, instructions, timeout, notificationChannels, timeoutValue, timeoutUnit, onFailure) and NotificationChannel interface - `editors/SharedFields.tsx` — understand the shared fields pattern - `BuilderPage.tsx` — find the human step editor section (search for `stepType === 'human'`) ## Create: builder/editors/HumanEditor.tsx Props: `{ step: PipelineStep; onUpdate: (patch: Partial) => void }` ### Section 1: Authority Simple input: ```tsx
Authority onUpdate({ authority: e.target.value })} placeholder="Who can approve? (email, role, or team)" />
``` ### Section 2: Notification Channels ```tsx
How to Notify {(step.notificationChannels ?? []).map(ch => (
{ch.kind === 'email' ? 'Email' : ch.kind === 'slack_webhook' ? 'Slack' : ch.kind === 'sms' ? 'SMS' : ch.kind === 'webhook' ? 'Webhook' : 'In-App'}
))}
``` addChannel: generates a new channel with `id: 'ch_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,8)`, kind: 'email', target: '', and appends to notificationChannels array. ### Section 3: Instructions ```tsx
Instructions

jobs.label: p3_api_editor
jobs.prompt:
## Objective Create the ApiEditor component for the builder — integration-aware with custom URL fallback. ## Working Directory `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/builder/` ## Context Read these files first: - `stepTypes.ts` — look at PipelineStep (endpoint, method, headers, bodyTemplate, integrationId, integrationName, objectTypeId, action) - `useIntegrations.ts` — hook that provides integrations from GET /api/integrations - `useObjectTypes.ts` — hook that provides object types from GET /api/object-types - `BuilderPage.tsx` — find the API step editor section (search for `stepType === 'api'`) ## Create: builder/editors/ApiEditor.tsx Props: `{ step: PipelineStep; onUpdate: (patch: Partial) => void }` Internal state: `mode: 'integration' | 'custom'` — default to 'integration' if step.integrationId is set, otherwise 'custom'. ### Section 1: Mode Toggle ```tsx
``` ### Section 2a: Integration Mode Use `useIntegrations()` and `useObjectTypes()` hooks. ```tsx {mode === 'integration' && ( <>
Integration {integrations.length === 0 && !loading && (
No integrations configured
)}
{step.integrationId && ( <> {/* Show capabilities as badges */} {(() => { const integ = integrations.find(i => i.id === step.integrationId); if (!integ) return null; return (
{(integ.capabilities || []).map(cap => ( {cap} ))}
); })()}
Object Type
Action
)} )} ``` ### Section 2b: Custom URL Mode ```tsx {mode === 'custom' && ( <>
Endpoint onUpdate({ endpoint: e.target.value })} placeholder="https://api.example.com/endpoint" />
Method
)} ``` ### Section 3: Headers (both modes) Key-value editor for `step.headers ?? {}`: ```tsx
Headers
{Object.entries(step.headers ?? {}).map(([key, value]) => (
))}
``` For header editing: maintain headers as Record. When key changes, delete old key and set new. addHeader adds an empty entry. ### Section 4: Body Template (both modes) ```tsx
Body Template

jobs.label: p4_agent_editor
jobs.prompt:
## Objective Create the AgentEditor component — extract and enhance the existing agent step editor from BuilderPage.tsx. ## Working Directory `Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/builder/` ## Context Read these files first: - `stepTypes.ts` — look at PipelineStep fields (agentName, systemPrompt, modelOverride, temperature, maxTokens, timeoutSeconds, agentRoute, contextPacks, outputShape, doneCriteria) - `CriteriaBuilder.tsx` — done criteria component to reuse - `useModels.ts` — hook providing models with performance data - `BuilderPage.tsx` — find the agent step editor section (search for `stepType === 'agent'`). This entire section needs to be extracted wholesale, then enhanced. ## Create: builder/editors/AgentEditor.tsx Props: `{ step: PipelineStep; onUpdate: (patch: Partial) => void }` ### Move from BuilderPage: All existing agent fields Copy the existing agent editor from BuilderPage.tsx (the block inside `selectedStep.stepType === 'agent'`). It has: - Agent Name input - System Prompt textarea - Model select (with useModels performance data) - Agent Route select - Advanced details (temperature, maxTokens, timeoutSeconds) Import `useModels` from '../useModels' and call it inside the component. The model select should look like: ```tsx ``` If a model is selected and has performance data, show stats below: ```tsx {step.modelOverride && (() => { const m = availableModels.find(m => m.slug === step.modelOverride); if (!m || m.dispatches === 0) return null; return (
{(m.passRate! * 100).toFixed(0)}% pass {m.dispatches} runs {m.avgLatency != null && {(m.avgLatency / 1000).toFixed(1)}s avg} {m.totalCost != null && ${m.totalCost.toFixed(2)} total}
); })()} ``` ### NEW Section: Context Packs Add after the route select, before Advanced: ```tsx
Context
{(step.contextPacks ?? []).map(cp => ( {cp.kind} {cp.label} ))}
{showAddContext ? (
) : ( )}
``` Context pack ID: `'cp_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,8)` ### NEW Section: Output Shape After context packs: ```tsx
Output Shape
{Object.entries(step.outputShape ?? {}).map(([field, type]) => (
))}
``` For output shape editing: maintain as Record. When field name changes, delete old key and create new. ### NEW Section: Done Criteria Import CriteriaBuilder from '../CriteriaBuilder' (read the component first to understand its props). ```tsx
Success Criteria onUpdate({ doneCriteria: criteria })} />
``` ## IMPORTANT - context-chips, context-chip, context-chip__kind, context-chip__remove, kv-editor, kv-row, kv-row__remove, editor-add-btn, builder-model-stats, builder-model-stat CSS classes all exist in builder.css - Read CriteriaBuilder.tsx to understand its exact props interface before using it - Use builder-section, builder-section__label, builder-input, builder-select, builder-textarea, builder-btn, builder-btn--primary - Export as named export - Component needs internal state for showAddContext, newCpLabel, newCpKind, newCpSourceRef
